title: celloexpress 60cm x 35cm Plain Clear Florist Bouquet Flower Sleeves - Gift Wrap, Cellophane Bag, Packing Cover (Pack of 50)
features: PACKAGE CONTAINS: Pack of 50 60cm x 35cm Plain Clear Flower Sleeves. Bottom width: 10cm

ELEGANT PRESENTATION: Beautiful florist bouquet sleeves designed to protect and enhance floral arrangements. Available in various designs, colours and sizes they offer elegant presentation for a range of occasions

VERSATILE DESIGNS: The perfect balance of protection, presentation and convivence, these cellophane sleeves are available in clear, printed and translucent designs. Made from durable, moisture-resistant cellophane keeping flowers protected for display and transportation
IDEAL FOR VARIOUS OCCASIONS: Perfect for birthdays, Valentine’s Day, Mother's Day, weddings and everyday occasions
PACK SIZES FOR YOUR CONVENIENCE: Available in packs of 10, 25, and 50 and 100, our flower sleeves are ideal for both personal use and professional florists
